## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync on launch blockers and tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Blockers Reduced:** The P0 blocker count is down to 3, with the Jan 31st target still in sight.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [**Critical Migration Today:** Jose will run a \~2-hour maintenance migration to convert workspace IDs to UIDs, requiring a full app shutdown.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Invitation Flow Decision Pending:** The auth flow is blocked pending a decision on whether to tie invitations to a specific email or let users choose their login.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**UI/UX Refinements:** The prompt table now groups pending items, and a UI fix makes prompt rows clickable for better discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Topics

### Launch Readiness & Blockers

  - [Ticket review over the weekend revealed and removed several duplicate or obsolete tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [**Current Blocker Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**P0 Blockers:** 3 remaining (target: Jan 31st).](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**Launch Blockers:** A larger, unspecified number remain.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Critical Task: Workspace ID Migration

  - [**Task:** Migrate workspace IDs from big integers (BNs) to Universal Unique Identifiers (UUIDs).](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A necessary pre-launch task to ensure data integrity and scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Timing:** This morning, after the Render point-in-time recovery checkpoint completes.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Downtime:** \~2 hours, with the app in maintenance mode to prevent database writes during the ID swap.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - **Communication:** Jose will post notices in the `#checkthat` and `#ask-checkthat` Slack channels.

### Blocked Task: Invitation Flow

  - [**Blocker:** The auth PR is blocked pending a decision on the invitation flow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Decision Point:** Should invitations be tied to a specific email, or should users be allowed to choose their login account?](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [**User Choice →** Prevents friction from email mismatches (e.g., `growthx.ai` invite vs. `growthxlabs.com` login).](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [**Email Tie →** Mitigates security risks like former employees retaining access to old company accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**Decision:** Jose will post the question to Marcel and Daniel in Slack for a final decision.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### UI/UX Refinements

  - [**Prompt Table Grouping:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [Pedro implemented a UI to group prompts that are "waiting to be probed" (i.e., still processing).](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [These items are now collapsible at the top of the table.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [**Action:** Jose requested clearer user-facing language, as "probe" is internal jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Prompt Row Clickability:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Stevie fixed a bug to make the entire prompt row clickable, improving discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Known Issue:** Right-click shortcuts (e.g., "Open in new tab") only work when hovering over the text, not the entire row. This is a minor inconsistency for super-users.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

      - [Review Pedro's auth PR today.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Merge the logo fallback fix.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - Sync with Stefan on taking over tickets `#609` and `#406`.
      - [Begin stabilization week tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/ZWRysyP_Y9at9ZS4MnUUXgBYTzPxBctt?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
